s: Place highest-priority rules in AGENT OPERATING CONTRACT at front. Tail rules have lower primacy.
Use task(explore). Enforce getSubAgentBudgetChars() cap. B3/B4 auto-compaction keeps under 80K.
Use getModelByTier() from registry.ts. Via catalog.json+settings+runtime. Throw on unresolvable.
Always log err.message+context. For HTTP: statusCode+responseBody. Never empty catch.
Run selfverify_start(mode=tier1). Pre-push hook auto-triggers on watched surfaces.
Use shouldDropParam() from runtime.ts. Never inline unsupportedParams check.

t: ee_query not used before risky step
s: Call ee_query before unfamiliar work. ee_feedback after acting. ee_write after fixing error.

t: test fails on WSL native bindings
s: Clone repo separately in WSL home. Never share node_modules between Win/WSL.
Use ee_query(tool-artifact id=XXX) to rehydrate. PRESERVE_FULL_CONTEXT veto or KEEP_TOOL_IDS.
Check stdlib->native->oneliner->YAGNI before adding npm dep.
Pre-push: bun test 0 failures + tsc --noEmit 0 errors. For UI: selfverify_start.
Max tool rounds 8. Strip irrelevant tool descriptions. Add SELF-LIMIT section.
Throttle to 150ms. useRef accumulator. Store reasoning in ChatEntry.

t: Semantic missing on new TUI element
s: Wrap with <Semantic>. Pick role from protocol.ts. Run lint:semantic.
Prefer unknown. Use type guards, discriminated unions, Zod for validation.
Every async call needs try/catch or .catch() handler. allSettled for parallel.
Use safeParse() in production. Explicit passthrough/strip.
Run dotnet restore before build. Check NuGet sources and Directory.Build.props.
Test with ExpressionTestHelper. Priority ordering. Per-rule try/catch.

t: tenant context not to background job
s: Capture at enqueue. Restore via TenantContext.Restore(). AsyncLocal for flow.
